General Aptitude • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • Expert • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Three classes A, B and C take a class test.
The average score in class A is 83.
The average score in class B is 76.
The average score in class C is 85.
The average score of all students in classes A and B is 79.
The average score of all students in classes B and C is 81.
The average score for all the three classes is ______.

NAT
Correct answer: 81.50
Solution

81.50

Q15 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

The additive used to increase the casting ability of Aluminium is

Correct answer: C
Solution

Silicon is commonly added to aluminium alloys to improve its castability. This includes enhancing fluidity, reducing melting point and reducing hot cracks during solidification.

Not attempted

The size of heat affected zone will increase with

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

The size of the heat affected zone will increase with the
• Increase in the starting temperature.
• Decrease in welding speed.
• Increase in thermal conductivity of base metal.
• Decrease in base metal thickness.
